'''rawate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zummet|zummet]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-w-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zummet|zummet]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| rawate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:rawate|rawate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rawatesher|rawatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rawatesherĂ«m|rawatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rawatero|rawatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rawateshĂ«|rawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rawateshĂ«m|rawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirawatero|gokirawatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirawateshĂ«|gokirawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirawateshĂ«m|gokirawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorawankerom|gorawankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorawankeshĂ«|gorawankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorawankeshĂ«m|gorawankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorawankeya|gorawankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rawaterom|rawaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rawatemu|rawatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rawateya|rawateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirawaterom|gokirawaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirawatemu|gokirawatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirawateya|gokirawateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:rawawate|rawawate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rawawatesher|rawawatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rawawatesherĂ«m|rawawatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rawawatero|rawawatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rawawateshĂ«|rawawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rawawateshĂ«m|rawawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirawawatero|gokirawawatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirawawateshĂ«|gokirawawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirawawateshĂ«m|gokirawawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorawawankerom|gorawawankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorawawankeshĂ«|gorawawankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorawawankeshĂ«m|gorawawankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorawawankeya|gorawawankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rawawaterom|rawawaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rawawatemu|rawawatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rawawateya|rawawateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirawawaterom|gokirawawaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirawawatemu|gokirawawatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirawawateya|gokirawawateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:rĂŠwĂŠte|rĂŠwĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rĂŠwĂŠtesher|rĂŠwĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠwĂŠtesherĂ«m|rĂŠwĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠwĂŠtero|rĂŠwĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«|rĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m|rĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠwĂŠtero|gokirĂŠwĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«|gokirĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m|gokirĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorĂŠwĂŠnkerom|gorĂŠwĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«|gorĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gorĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorĂŠwĂŠnkeya|gorĂŠwĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠwĂŠterom|rĂŠwĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠwĂŠtemu|rĂŠwĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rĂŠwĂŠteya|rĂŠwĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠwĂŠterom|gokirĂŠwĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠwĂŠtemu|gokirĂŠwĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirĂŠwĂŠteya|gokirĂŠwĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:rafwafte|rafwafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rafwaftesher|rafwaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafwaftesherĂ«m|rafwaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafwaftero|rafwaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rafwafteshĂ«|rafwafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafwafteshĂ«m|rafwafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafwaftero|gokirafwaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirafwafteshĂ«|gokirafwafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafwafteshĂ«m|gokirafwafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorafwafnkerom|gorafwafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorafwafnkeshĂ«|gorafwafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorafwafnkeshĂ«m|gorafwafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorafwafnkeya|gorafwafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafwafterom|rafwafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafwaftemu|rafwaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rafwafteya|rafwafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafwafterom|gokirafwafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafwaftemu|gokirafwaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirafwafteya|gokirafwafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
